summary: Completed comprehensive testing of extension-based approach replacing Teamtailor API integration. All backend extension endpoints working correctly, frontend Extension page fully functional, landing page Problem section updated as required.

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard API permission denied causing error overlay
ui_bugs.details: Copy button triggers clipboard permission error in testing environment, blocking other interactions with error overlay

passed_tests: All extension backend endpoints (GET /api/extension/key, POST /api/extension/regenerate-key, POST /api/extension/push-candidate with various auth scenarios, GET /api/extension/recent-pushes)
Extension page loads with all required sections (How it Works, API Key card, Setup instructions, Recently Pushed)
Extension key display and show/hide functionality
Extension setup instructions show correct endpoint and headers
Recent pushes display correctly with candidate data
Sidebar navigation renamed from Teamtailor to Extension
Landing page Problem section has NO image and shows centered stats (72%, 3x, 10h)
Pipeline page still works with existing candidates
All auth flows and candidate CRUD operations
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix clipboard API permission issue in Extension page copy button - consider using a fallback method or handling the permission error gracefully to prevent error overlay from blocking UI interactions
